settings.title: Settings
settings.legalDesc: Get legal help for rental issues
settings.legalPageDesc: Terms of service and privacy policy
settings.verificationDesc: Verify your identity for trusted access

verification.title: Identity Verification
verification.subtitle: Verify your identity for trusted access
verification.uploadIdDesc: Passport, driver's license, or national ID
verification.submitted: Verification submitted! We'll review it shortly.

tour.swipeDesc: Swipe right to like, left to pass. Find your perfect match!
tour.filtersDesc: Customize what you see — price, location, amenities & more.
tour.messagesDesc: Chat with matches and owners directly in the app.
tour.exploreDesc: Discover neighborhoods, price trends, and local intel.
tour.settingsDesc: Manage your profile, security, and preferences.

screen1.title: Welcome to Swipess 🎉
screen1.body:
Real homes, bikes & jobs — all in one place.
Swipe to find your match.

screen2.title: You're protected here 🛡️
screen2.body:
Every listing is from a real person.
We flag scams fast — you stay safe.

screen3.title: Almost ready! 🚀
screen3.body:
Complete your profile — it gets you better matches.
Takes 60 seconds.

profile.title: Your profile = your trust score 👤
profile.body:
Add a photo, bio & ID verify.
More complete = more matches.

createListing.title: Great listings get matches fast 📋
createListing.body:
Add real photos, honest price & location.
Fake info = instant ban.

rideSection.title: Renting a ride? Read this first 🏍️
rideSection.body:
Always check the bike in person before paying.
No meet = no deal.

miniContract.title: This is your protection 📝
miniContract.body:
A mini-contract records what you both agreed.
Signed = both sides are safe.

newMatch.title: New match — stay smart 💬
newMatch.body:
Never send money before meeting in person.
Keep all chats inside the app.

property.title: Protect your property 🏠
property.body:
Meet renters in person — never hand keys without ID.
Use the mini-contract. Always.

bikeRental.title: Renting out your bike? ⚠️
bikeRental.body:
Take a deposit + photo of renter's ID before handover.
Document the bike condition first.

serviceProvider.title: Starting a job? Protect yourself 🔧
serviceProvider.body:
Agree on price & scope before you start.
Get it in writing — use the mini-contract.

paymentWarning.title: Never work for free first 💸
paymentWarning.body:
Clients pay a deposit or agree in writing before work starts.
No prepayment scams — report them instantly.

antiScam.title: Spot a scam before it hits you 🚨
antiScam.body:
Price too good? No in-person meet? Red flag.
Report it — we act fast.

beforePaying.title: Before you pay — check 3 things 👀
beforePaying.body:
① Verified profile  ② Real photos  ③ Meet first
No checks = high risk.

renterProtection.title: Renting a place? Your rights matter 🏠
renterProtection.body:
Always sign a mini-contract before moving in.
Problems? Report directly in the app.

reportBadActor.title: Something feels wrong? Act now 🚩
reportBadActor.body:
Tap "Report" on any profile or chat.
We review within 24h — no retaliation allowed.
